gaps: A way to see the snapshot's associated opinion-cluster metadata (date, reporter citation) without fetching new case facts — it would disambiguate historical captions cheaply
Docket-level filter for fedcourts query (e.g. by case_id prefix or source) to find priors from the same bulk-import population directly
helpful: fedcourts stats --court scotus for the resolved-label distribution (other/dismissed/denied/granted), the main calibration anchor for this sparse docket
fedcourts query --disposition granted/dismissed spot-checks to see what the rare non-'other' labels actually attach to
notes: Snapshot had no petition-stage facts at all (bulk-import shell), so the prediction is essentially base-rate-driven; see flags.json. Term-year and originating-court group-bys were mostly empty for the resolved SCOTUS set, limiting the recommended calibration cuts.
